SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JRE container path to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.why_exists: The project configuration must align with the target JDK version to ensure correct compilation and runtime behavior; using JavaSE-1.8 on a Java 21 project may cause compatibility warnings or incorrect API resolution.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.general_idea: Add classpath entry for generated annotation sources to support annotation processing.
Add classpath entry for generated test annotation sources to support test annotation processing.
Reorder attributes in src/test/java classpath entry to match Maven/eclipse standard ordering.

<attribute name="optional" value="true"/>
			<attribute name="maven.pomderived" value="true"/>
			<attribute name="test" value="true"/>
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.after:
<attribute name="test" value="true"/>
			<attribute name="optional" value="true"/>
			<attribute name="maven.pomderived" value="true"/>

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.project.general_idea: Rename the Eclipse project description name to match the new repository or module identifier.
Add Spring Boot IDE validation builder to the Eclipse project configuration.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler target platform setting from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; compiling with target 1.8 generates bytecode incompatible with the new runtime environment or intended deployment target.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler compliance level from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; compliance 1.8 restricts the use of Java 11 language features required by the codebase.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler source level from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; source 1.8 prevents parsing of Java 11 syntax.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Enable generation of debug information for line numbers in the Eclipse JDT compiler settings.
Enable generation of debug information for local variables in the Eclipse JDT compiler settings.
Enable generation of debug information for source files in the Eclipse JDT compiler settings.
Configure the Eclipse JDT compiler to preserve unused local variables in debug info.
Change the reporting level for preview features from ignore to warning in the Eclipse JDT compiler settings.
Disable annotation processing in the Eclipse JDT compiler settings.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; using Java 1.8 settings would result in incompatibility with Java 21 features or runtime errors if the target JDK is 21.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven-compiler-plugin source and target to 11 to ensure compatibility with the build environment.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with outdated source/target levels (or defaults) against a newer JDK or dependencies may cause compilation errors or warnings; explicitly setting 11 ensures baseline compatibility.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM argument to open java.base/java.time module for reflection access.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: Java 9+ modules restrict reflection access to internal APIs like java.time; without this flag, libraries relying on reflection (e.g., Jackson, Gson) may fail at runtime with InaccessibleObjectException.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Gson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Jackson Databind dependency for JSON processing.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype dependency for Java 8+ date/time API support.
Add Jsoup dependency for HTML parsing.
Add Spring Boot Starter JDBC dependency for database access.
Add jQuery UI WebJar dependency for UI components.
Update the main class name in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
Add Spring Boot Maven Plugin configuration to make the jar executable.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Implement WebMvcConfigurer interface to enable Spring MVC configuration overrides for internationalization and resource handling.
Add imports for Spring MVC i18n and configuration classes required for locale resolution and message sources.
Add import for java.util.Locale to support locale configuration.
Define a LocaleResolver bean using CookieLocaleResolver with Serbian as the default locale.
Define a MessageSource bean to load internationalization messages from resource bundles.
Define a LocaleChangeInterceptor bean to allow language switching via URL parameter.
Register the locale change interceptor in the Spring MVC interceptor registry.
Configure resource handlers to serve static files from classpath and uploaded files from the file system.
Add @SuppressWarnings annotation to suppress serial version UID warning in inner class.
Fix spacing in bean annotation and method signature for consistency.
Add space in string concatenation for better readability in toString method.
Add space after comment marker in init method comment.
Add space after comment marker in destroy method comment.
Replace in-memory data storage with a database-backed service layer for persistence.
Migrate from inline HTML string generation to Spring MVC ModelAndView with Thymeleaf templates.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.why_exists: Compile error: incompatible types when assigning or passing String where Kontinenti is expected, or vice versa, if the rest of the codebase expects the enum.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Add a new field 'putanjaDoSlike' to store the image path for the location.
